title: Golden Apple Counter
description: Counts how many golden apples your opponent has ate
body: A client-side Fabric mod that tracks how many golden apples other players eat in multiplayer and displays the count next to their name above their head, using the actual golden apple item texture as an icon. Supports both regular and enchanted golden apples, with a Mod Menu config screen to toggle counting, choose counter placement (left or right of name), and optionally show your own count.
